text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 
50 
GAP_DAYS_INP_1M 
LABEL: 
Gap In-Network Pharmacy — days in 1-month supply 
DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the number of days in a one-month supply of a drug on this tier, when using an 
in-network pharmacy (INP; also known as a standard retail pharmacy) during the coverage gap phase 
of the Part D benefit. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: GAP_DAYS_INP_1M 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8
